message.content: {"analysis":"The kill commands are being typed but the old autotune process keeps running. Commands seem to be queued behind the running process. Need to send multiple Ctrl+C signals to interrupt the running process first.","plan":"Send multiple Ctrl+C signals to interrupt the autotune process, then verify clean state and run training.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":2.0}]}
